text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What's wrong with me? My body has felt so sluggish since that last race...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm sorry... You don't need to worry about
me! Let's begin the next part of today's regimen.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Right! Tuck in those elbows and lay into the
sandbag with a right—ACK!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch as she thrusts her heel directly into the
wall.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: GYAAAH?! I busted open another hole in the—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Th-this is strange... Normally, a kick like that
would have bust right through...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Luckily, she didn't destroy the wall, but I suppose
that means she's lacking her usual strength.
Perhaps I should revise her race schedule.
